name: Fruit Cake W/o Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter thoroughly.
2. Add yolks of eggs, one at a time.
3. Incorporate allspice, grape jelly, and grape juice.
4. Gradually add flour along with the mixed fruits.
5. Gently fold in the egg whites.
6. Bake for 2 hours in three pans at 270 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Optionally, decorate with nuts and additional fruits if desired.
